overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character ascending a dark emergency stairwell, entering a gritty neon-lit dive bar called CIRKUS, transitioning through a city street to an upscale modern lounge with luxury furnishings, and finally stepping onto an outdoor terrace with illuminated architecture overlooking the city at night.

events.description: approaching and opening exit door at top of stairwell

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs toward illuminated exit door

entered.detail: green illuminated exit sign above metal door
worn gray concrete stairs and walls with exposed pipes
exposed utility pipes and conduits running along walls

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a dimly lit concrete emergency stairwell with exposed pipes and conduits. Green emergency lighting illuminates an exit sign above a metal door at the top of the stairs.

patron walking through smoke-filled background area

entered.detail: large red neon sign with white star logo reading CIRKUS
retro arcade cabinet with glowing red digital display
long wooden bar with green neon underlighting and bottles
large illuminated fish tank with green lighting behind bar
exposed brick wall with posters and arcade machine

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit dive bar called CIRKUS with red and green neon lighting. The space features a long bar with an aquarium backdrop, a retro arcade machine, and scattered patrons. Smoke fills the air as the player walks past bar stools and digital screens toward the exit.

events.description: exiting bar to city street at night
entering upscale lounge through glass doors

agents.ego_description: stepping out onto street then immediately entering luxury establishment

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking on city street outside

entered.detail: glass door with green neon trim leading to street
night city street with distant lights and pedestrians
modern entrance to upscale bar with marble floors

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dive bar onto a dark city street briefly, then enters a modern upscale lounge through glass doors. The transition moves from gritty neon to polished marble and warm accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale modern lounge with luxury bar and vending

events.description: turning to survey lounge seating area and vending machines
walking past central coffee table toward bar area

agents.ego_description: exploring high-end lounge examining digital displays and seating areas

patron standing near illuminated vending machines

entered.detail: sleek black bar with teal stools and warm underlighting
warm linear LED strips along ceiling and floor edges
tall illuminated beverage vending machines with digital menus
tall digital screens displaying product advertisements
white sectional sofa with black coffee table

segments.scene_description: The player explores a luxurious modern lounge with polished marble floors, warm neon accent lighting, and high-end furnishings. Digital advertising pillars and vending machines line the walls while a sleek bar with teal stools occupies the left side. The space contrasts sharply with the previous gritty dive bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor terrace with illuminated floor panels

events.description: exiting lounge to outdoor terrace with city views

agents.ego_description: walking onto outdoor terrace overlooking the city at night

entered.detail: glowing rectangular panels embedded in terrace floor displaying text
circular seating areas with green underlighting
tall structural columns supporting overhead structure
distant city lights and buildings visible in night sky

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto an outdoor terrace with illuminated floor panels and modern outdoor seating pods with green lighting. The space features decorative trees and offers views of the distant city skyline at night, creating an open-air conclusion to the sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that ascends from a gritty industrial stairwell through a neon-lit dive bar and into a luxurious modern lounge. It begins by climbing a dimly lit concrete emergency stairwell with exposed pipes, moving toward a green exit sign that leads into the smoke-filled interior of a dive bar called CIRKUS. As the camera navigates past red and green neon lights, an aquarium backdrop, and retro arcade machines, it exits briefly onto a dark city street before passing through glass doors into a polished upscale lounge. The environment shifts abruptly from gritty textures to marble floors and warm accent lighting, gliding past digital advertising pillars and a sleek bar with teal stools. Finally, the scene opens up as the camera steps onto an outdoor terrace featuring illuminated floor panels and green seating pods overlooking the distant city skyline at night.
